div1.entryFree: Abode, subst., stay, continuance in a place: R3 I, 3, 169. Oth. IV, 2, 231. Ant. I, 2, 182. your patience for my long a. Merch. II, 6, 21 (for my being so late). desire my man's a. where I did leave him, Cymb. I, 6, 53 (desire him to stay, to remain where etc.). to make a. == to dwell, to live: Gent. IV, 3, 23. H6A V, 4, 88. Lr. I, 1, 136. where is thy a.? Shr. IV, 5, 38 (πόθι τοι πόλις;).
